name: Lafangey - Sapne, Dosti, Duniya
overview: Lafangey is a heartwarming story about three childhood friends—Chaitanya, Rohan, and Kamlesh—who live in a small colony in Noida. Now grown up, they each face the struggles of adult life while trying to hold on to their dreams. The show beautifully captures their friendship, problems, and how they try to find their place in the world. Chaitanya is clever and sharp, but he often finds himself in moral confusion. He has completed his B.Tech and wants to make his parents proud. However, when life doesn't go as planned, he gets attracted to the idea of making fast money through illegal sports betting. His decisions bring problems at home and make him question what real success and respect mean.

trailers.title: Lafangey - Official Trailer | Harsh Beniwal, Barkha Singh, Gagan Arora & Anud | Amazon MX Player
